hero.title: Navigate EU AI Act Compliance with Confidence
hero.description: Comprehensive tools to assess, document, and maintain compliance with the European Union Artificial Intelligence Act. From risk classification to regulatory reporting, all in one platform.
hero.note: No credit card required. Free plan includes Art.6 risk assessment and EU AI Act knowledge base.
hero.ctaDescription: Join businesses across Europe using our platform to navigate EU AI Act requirements. Free plan available — no credit card required.

features.title: Everything you need for AI compliance
features.description: Built specifically for the EU AI Act, with tools covering every article from risk classification to post-market monitoring.

riskClassification.title: Risk Classification
riskClassification.description: Self-assess your AI systems against EU AI Act Article 6 risk levels. Get instant classification with regulatory article references.

prohibitedPractices.title: Prohibited Practices Check
prohibitedPractices.description: Verify your AI systems against Article 5 prohibited practices. 8-point checklist with clear compliance guidance.

transparency.title: Transparency Obligations
transparency.description: Ensure your AI systems meet Article 50 transparency requirements. 5-point verification with documentation templates.

documentation.title: Compliance Documentation
documentation.description: Generate technical documentation, risk management reports, and conformity assessment packages aligned with Annex IV.

urlScan.title: URL Compliance Scan
urlScan.description: Scan any public URL for AI compliance indicators. Identify potential risk factors and regulatory gaps automatically.

reports.title: Multi-language Reports
reports.description: Export compliance reports in English, German, French, Spanish, and Italian. Ready for regulatory submissions across the EU.

articles.title: Coverage across the full regulation
articles.description: Our tools map directly to specific EU AI Act articles and annexes, ensuring no compliance gap is overlooked.

prohibitedPractices.title: Prohibited AI Practices
prohibitedPractices.description: Social scoring, biometric identification, emotion recognition in workplace/education

riskClassification.title: Risk Classification
riskClassification.description: High-risk, limited-risk, minimal-risk categorization with clear criteria

highRisk.title: High-Risk Requirements
highRisk.description: Risk management, data governance, transparency, human oversight, accuracy

transparency.title: Transparency Obligations
transparency.description: Chatbot disclosure, deepfake labeling, emotion recognition notification

qualityManagement.title: Quality Management
qualityManagement.description: QMS establishment, documentation, post-market monitoring procedures

fria.title: FRIA
fria.description: Fundamental Rights Impact Assessment for high-risk AI systems

technicalDocs.title: Technical Documentation
technicalDocs.description: Complete technical documentation templates for high-risk AI systems

gpai.title: GPAI Compliance
gpai.description: General-purpose AI model obligations, systemic risk evaluation

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your compliance needs. All prices include EU VAT. No hidden fees.
pricing.description: Choose the plan that fits your compliance needs. All prices include EU VAT. No hidden fees.
pricing.footer: All plans include GDPR/CCPA compliant data handling. You can cancel anytime. Questions?
